---
name: Pull Request Template
about: Help us review your pull request efficiently
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

## 📝 Description

Please include a summary of the changes and related context. Why is this change needed? What problem does it solve?

Fixes #(issue number)

## 🔧 Type of Change

Please delete options that are not relevant:

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] UI/UX improvement
- [ ] Performance improvement

## 🧪 How Has This Been Tested?

Please describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes. Provide instructions so we can reproduce. Please also list any relevant details for your test configuration:

- [ ] Tested on Desktop (Chrome/Firefox/Safari/Edge)
- [ ] Tested on Mobile (iOS/Android)
- [ ] No console errors
- [ ] All existing features still work
- [ ] Resize modes (Fit/Fill/Stretch) work correctly
- [ ] Drag & drop works
- [ ] File upload works
- [ ] Image download works

## 📸 Screenshots (if applicable)

Add screenshots or GIFs showing the changes, especially for UI modifications:

<!-- Add screenshots here -->

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have tested this on desktop and mobile
- [ ] I have tested all three resize modes
- [ ] This PR follows the code style guide of this project
- [ ] I have not introduced any breaking changes

## 📋 Additional Context

Add any other context about the PR here (performance considerations, edge cases, backwards compatibility, etc.):

---

**Thank you for your contribution! 🎉**

Please make sure your code:
- Uses consistent formatting
- Includes meaningful variable names
- Has comments for complex logic
- Works across browsers (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge)
- Is responsive on mobile devices
